underlying_goal: Implement a Linear ticket to hide the sidebar (desktop and mobile hamburger menu) on the realtime interpret conversation show page when the conversation is in progress, and show it when saved
friction_detail: ESLint curly brace rule violation on the initial code change required a CI fix push.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to implement a Linear ticket hiding the sidebar during active interpret conversations; Claude implemented it across controller and frontend, fixed a CI lint failure, added tests, and shipped a green PR.
